parameters: You are very brave to come with me
Sir, you must stop creating this chaos
It was fun, but we have to go back to the OtherSite
We need to destroy all so-called heroes like that human over there
I understand that Kenji hurt you...
He wants to get rid of all the "heroes"
Even if it means killing others in process
I can lock your smile too forever...\.smiledock
Don't you remember your friend Thender?
You really almost killed this human
so that he can be proud?
You know very well that he abandoned us
And for the others who are here and still don't understand this...
A long time ago... there lived a kid named Kenji
That child had a fascination with exploration
he was always ready to save everyone
He was traveling with his friends, Sterven and Jose
And Sterven comes from a family heavily criticized by the Omi community
They fought against the King of Dariia, in the most dangerous adventure
Nothing stops them, they traveled to many places and Kenji found writings
about a legend that would save people from a greater threat
He believed he would become that legend and wrote down everything he saw in
He wouldn't make friends with many Omi, but he was our friend
Everything was fine until he became frustrated upon discovering that...
he fought with his friends in a bloody battle...
He dedicated himself to searching for the legend....
In the end, he fought that person face to face...
Having almost killed him, He gave all his power in search of
It is said that this hero already received the magic some years ago
\C[1]Mason Roux\C[0]...he had magic before I gave him
In any case, we must warn him
Nideho figured out years ago how many heroes would emerge
We must find that third, we need to have all three humans as soon as possible
I feel a little weak, but I think I owe you an apology
I was blinded by the desire to get it back...
Well then... you've GOT ME back, right?
I'll kick your ass, dumpy cat
It's an honor to have you back, my love...
Oh Smiledock, I had forgotten about you...
It's a shame that it will be the last thing we hear
Reach the finish line before time runs out!
Reach the finish line before time runs out!
Sorry I like this song! lol
